scripts.start: concurrently --names "APPOINTMENT,AUTH,DOCTOR,PATIENT,TELEMED,WEB,ADMIN" --prefix "[{name}]" --prefix-colors "cyan,blue,magenta,green,yellow,gray,white" "npm run dev --prefix services/appointment-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/doctor-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/patient-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/telemedicine-service" "npm run dev --prefix frontend/web-client" "npm run dev --prefix admin"
